'''dhadhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibadat|ibadat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibadat|ibadat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhimith|dhædhimith]] || [[word:dhædhimij|dhædhimij]] || [[word:dhædhimish|dhædhimish]] || [[word:dhædhimi|dhædhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhudhumuth|dhadhudhumuth]] || [[word:dhadhudhumuj|dhadhudhumuj]] || [[word:dhadhudhumush|dhadhudhumush]] || [[word:dhadhudhumu|dhadhudhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhumuth|dhadhumuth]] || [[word:dhadhumuj|dhadhumuj]] || [[word:dhadhumush|dhadhumush]] || [[word:dhadhumu|dhadhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhufmuth|dhadhufmuth]] || [[word:dhadhufmuj|dhadhufmuj]] || [[word:dhadhufmush|dhadhufmush]] || [[word:dhadhufmuf|dhadhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhumuthu|dhadhumuthu]] || [[word:dhadhumuju|dhadhumuju]] || [[word:dhadhumushu|dhadhumushu]] || [[word:dhadhumuku|dhadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhumuth|dhadhumuth]] || [[word:dhadhumuj|dhadhumuj]] || [[word:dhadhumush|dhadhumush]] || [[word:dhadhumu|dhadhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhumuthul|dhadhumuthul]] || [[word:dhadhumujul|dhadhumujul]] || [[word:dhadhumushul|dhadhumushul]] || [[word:dhadhumukul|dhadhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhumuthuthu|dhadhumuthuthu]] || [[word:dhadhumujuju|dhadhumujuju]] || [[word:dhadhumushushu|dhadhumushushu]] || [[word:dhadhumuku|dhadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhumuthun|dhadhumuthun]] || [[word:dhadhumujun|dhadhumujun]] || [[word:dhadhumushun|dhadhumushun]] || [[word:dhadhumukun|dhadhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhumuthuoro|dhadhumuthuoro]] || [[word:dhadhumujuoro|dhadhumujuoro]] || [[word:dhadhumushuoro|dhadhumushuoro]] || [[word:dhadhumukuoro|dhadhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
